word: G2945 - κύκλῳ - kýklōi - koo'-klo - Round about

sections.paragraph: இலக்கண சொல்வகை / Part(s) of speech: Adverb / வினையடை
in a circle, around, round about

ஆங்கில மூலம் / Original in English: As if dative case of κύκλος kuklos (a ring, “cycle”; akin to G2947); that is, in a circle (by implication of G1722), that is, (adverbially) all around: - round about.
